name: game_opponent single year_offset shifts the game CTE year and join correlation
description: game_opponent with year=[2023] week=[1] + single year_offset=[1] offset-expands the game CTE to the 2024 week-1 nfl_week_id and correlates the join on game.year = player_year_teams.year + 1, returning next-year (2024) opponent for the player base-year (2023) team. Previously the offset was dropped in both the CTE filter and the join.
expected_query: with "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_1') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_1')) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2.game_opponent as game_opponent_0, tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2.game_is_home as game_is_home_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2" on "tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2.year = player_year_teams.year + 1 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2.game_opponent, tfb77aedb84b029b95b61e438ba1624a2.game_is_home, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
